arts.ttl: Quitting Arsenal is my big regret - things weren't the same at Chelsea
arts.sum: "If I was Philippe Coutinho, every morning I would wake up and think to myself, 'Why, why, did I sign [for Barcelona] in Spain?'" Petit told Mirror Football . Because, I can remember the time when I'd wake up, when I was at Barcelona, when I left Arsenal, and I was thinking the same way, 'why did I leave?

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton shares the 'important' thing that now needs to happen at Arsenal as he predicts tonight's score
arts.sum: Arsenal will try to narrow the gap between themselves and Premier League leaders Liverpool when they host Ipswich Town at the Emirates Stadium on Friday...

arts.ttl: Arsenal given major Dani Olmo transfer update as Barcelona decision made ahead of January window
arts.sum: That allowed Barcelona to meet La Liga's salary limit and have Olmo available to play, but they are now again struggling to find space for the player. Barcelona have failed in their latest attempts to register Dani Olmo for the rest of the season amid reported interest from Arsenal in the Spain international.

arts.ttl: Michael Owen makes Arsenal and Chelsea Premier League title prediction after Liverpool statement
arts.sum: Despite Liverpool's strong position, seven points clear with just one defeat this season under Arne Slot, Owen sees potential in fourth-placed Arsenal, who could climb to second with a victory over Ipswich at the Emirates Stadium tonight after Chelsea lost to Fulham on Boxing Day. But I think they're only a danger to themselves, the way they are playing, unless they implode themselves, unless they have a Manchester City moment, it looks like they're streaking clear."

arts.ttl: Leipzig set price tag for Arsenal transfer target
arts.sum: RB Leipzig will demand a fee of at least €70m (£58.2m) to sell Arsenal transfer target Benjamin Sesko. The Slovenian striker is top of Arsenal’s wish list as the Gunners look to sign a centre-forward. Mikel Arteta’s side failed with a bid to sign the 21-year-old in the summer, as Sesko turned down interest from […] The post Leipzig set price tag for Arsenal transfer target first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal explore blockbuster deal to sign striker in January transfer window
arts.sum: Arsenal have struggled to score goals this season and they could address that issue in the January transfer window. The Gunners have relied heavily on set pieces this season to score goals and the likes of Kai Havertz, Gabriel Jesus and Leandro Trossard have all failed to make a huge impact this season. In order […] The post Report: Arsenal explore blockbuster deal to sign striker in January transfer window appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Who is Konstantinos Karetsas? Arsenal in transfer race for wonderkid who turned down Man City
arts.sum: The player broke into the first team at his boyhood club in February and made four appearances last season, assisting the only goal - for former Brighton and Hove Albion centre-forward Andi Zeqiri - in a 1-0 win over Royal Antwerp during May's champions' play-offs. Arsenal are reportedly in a race with Manchester City and Real Madrid to sign teenage Genk midfielder Konstantinos Karetsas.

arts.ttl: Liverpool accused of copying Arsenal's corner routine during win over Leicester but unimpressed Gunners fans say they 'made it look impossible to score'
arts.sum: Viewers watching Liverpool's clash with Leicester City at Anfield on Boxing Day noticed something familiar about their tactics at corner kicks.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Update on Nwaneri and Lewis-Skelly Leaving in January
arts.sum: Neither Ethan Nwaneri or Myles Lewis-Skelly will be allowed to leave Arsenal on loan in January.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fear nightmare Bukayo Saka injury scenario as update given
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly initially feared that Bukayo Saka’s hamstring had become detached from the bone following his injury against Crystal Palace - although, in reality, it is thought that the winger will not require surgery. Mikel Arteta says the 23-year-old will be out for “many weeks” and could not provide a precise recovery time.
